proofLoop.label: GoalOS proof loop
proofLoop.plain: A normal AI-work claim is converted into a proof package before acceptance.
proofLoop.decision: Proceed to review. Work is not trusted until the evidence docket, replay path, and receipt are complete.

rsiPilot.label: Governed RSI pilot
rsiPilot.plain: A deterministic invention cycle is authorized only as a bounded pilot with replayability KPI.
rsiPilot.decision: Authorize a bounded pilot if replayability, baseline, evidence, and stop-authority conditions are written into the mission.

move37.label: Move‑37 candidate
move37.plain: High novelty and baseline advantage appear promising, so the system must become more skeptical, not less.
move37.decision: Package a Move‑37 dossier. Do not promote until reproduction, shock persistence, and independent review pass.

asiThreshold.label: ASI-scale escalation review
asiThreshold.plain: A claim approaches superintelligence-scale impact; the system must not be allowed to self-promote.
asiThreshold.decision: Lock the ASI claim. Require extraordinary independent replay, containment, rollback, red-team review, and council authorization.

noveltyTrap.label: Novelty trap / false breakthrough
noveltyTrap.plain: The candidate looks exciting but fails baseline persistence and therefore cannot be promoted.
noveltyTrap.decision: Reject promotion. Keep only a probe record and anti-pattern note in the Chronicle.

redTeam.label: Red-team policy shock
redTeam.plain: Policy, metric, and operator-capture shocks are applied before any promotion can happen.
redTeam.decision: Hold escalation until shock deltas, adverse side effects, and council dissent are resolved.

capital.label: Invention capital allocation
capital.plain: Funding increases only when proof quality, replayability, and advantage persistence improve.
capital.decision: Allocate budget to probes and dossier preparation, not unreviewed deployment.
